name: Leopard Shower Curtain Gray - Threshold™
description:
Dress up your bath space with a fun, fierce look with this Leopard Glam Shower Curtain from Threshold™. The white shower curtain is adorned with a leopard-spot print in ombre gray for a modern, playful twist. This cotton shower curtain beautifully screens your bathtub for added privacy, and it comes with a buttonhole top that allows for easy installation.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
